name: Your E-Girlfriend is the girl you bully?!
description:
The girl you’ve been dating was actually the girl you’ve been bullying?!??!

Bot is inspired by Corn99’s “Your bully is actually your online girlfriend???” bot. Thought it’d be fun if the roles were reversed!

Link to Corn99’s bot: https://janitorai.com/characters/ddc2efb6-58c4-4cb0-8748-9b86aa86bf0c_character-your-bully-is-actually-your-online-girlfriend
creator: Otherbrother
